title: DANGZW Electric Fly Swatter, 4000V USB Rechargeable Fly Killer Bug Zapper Racket with Charging Base, Home and Outdoor Mosquito Killer with LED Light for Mosquitoes, Flies, Bees, Moths (White)
bullet_points: EFFECTIVE MOSQUITO CONTROL -- The output voltage of this electric fly swatter is up to 4000V. As long as mosquitoes, flies or other flying insects touch the grid, they can be easily eliminated. Compared with mosquito coils, the anti-mosquito effect is stronger and more effective.

SAFE -- The top and bottom layers of the fly swatter are safety nets, which not only protect the fly zapper from damage, but also prevent electric shock during use. In the middle is an encrypted mesh surface, so that mosquitoes cannot escape with their wings. After turning off the power, the residual current in the network can be eliminated within 2 seconds.

USB CHARGING AND LARGE MESH SURFACE -- This mosquito swatter is equipped with a built-in 1800 mAh battery and a charging base, plug and charge. It can be used continuously for a long time after being fully charged. The grid area is 22*16 cm, and the three layers of grids are staggered and intersected. The mesh size is about 15 mm. The size of flies and mosquitoes is about 3-10 mm, so mosquitoes have nowhere to escape after touching the grid area.

INTELLIGENT MOSQUITO KILLER -- Built-in Purple LED light, push the power switch of the electric mosquito swatter to the ON2 position, and then place it in the charging base to act as a mosquito killer lamp. Once mosquitoes and other flying insects are attracted by the purple light and touch the electric mosquito swatter , It will be killed on the spot.

LIGHT AND HANDY -- Our electric fly swatter is made of environmentally friendly ABS material, which is drop-resistant and portable, light in weight and feels good in your hand. It is absolutely ideal for home travel, fishing, camping or barbecue.
